title: Chewy Sweet Filipino Rice Cakes Skewers
description: A quick-fix Filipino dish featuring light brown soft sugar, these chewy sweet rice cakes are perfect for snacking. Made with egg-free friendly ingredients and cooked to perfection using sous-vide.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine glutinous rice flour and light brown soft sugar.
Gradually add in water and coconut milk, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
Thread 3-4 balls onto each bamboo skewer, leaving a small space between each ball.
Place the skewers in a single layer in the sous-vide machine and cook for 30 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the sous-vide machine and brush with vegetable oil.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve warm.
